positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~mountain_range_in(picuris,texas)).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    mine_in(harding_pegmatite,picuris)).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    new_mexico != harding_pegmatite).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    texas != juan_de_onate).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    donated(harding_pegmatite)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    new_mexico != texas).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    picuris != juan_de_onate).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    new_mexico != juan_de_onate).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    picuris != harding_pegmatite).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    picuris != new_mexico).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    picuris != texas).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    texas != harding_pegmatite).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    juan_de_onate != harding_pegmatite).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    visited(juan_de_onate,picuris)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~mine_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
